settings.heading: School spirit wear for DFW campuses, clubs and teams.
settings.lead: Create spirit shirts, hoodies, polos and fundraiser stores for schools and booster clubs across DFW.
settings.body:
L F Graphco helps DFW schools and booster clubs build apparel programs around campaigns, events, athletics and campus pride. Spirit wear can be produced through bulk orders or online team stores.

Request a quote with school colors, mascot artwork, quantity goals and deadline.

settings.heading: Turn school colors and mascot art into quote-ready apparel.
settings.intro: Send the mascot, logo, colors and quantity goal. L F Graphco can help review placement and decoration options.

settings.heading: Spirit wear options for schools, clubs and booster programs.
settings.intro: Quote shirts, hoodies, polos, DTF designs and promotional items for campus events, athletics and fundraisers.

settings.heading: Get spirit wear pricing for your school deadline.
settings.intro: Share the school name, project type, estimated quantity and due date so the team can respond with the next step.
